page_content:
CLASSICAL MYTHOLOGY MINOR

Classics (CLAS) 1210 Marie Mount Hall Phone: 301-405-2360 http://classics.umd.edu

Director of Undergraduate Studies: Jorge J. Bravo III, Ph.D.

This minor will introduce students to classical mythology, its uses within ancient Greek and Roman culture, and its subsequent influence on art and literature. The minor requires 15 credits.

Students interested in pursuing this minor should consult with the Director of Undergraduate Studies in the Department of Classics.
